findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "submit_request" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Submit an async inference request to a deployment. Backs ``POST /prod/v1/deployments/{deployment_id}/inference``. Args: deployment_id: Target deployment. overri…

labels.name: submit_request
labels.description:
Submit an async inference request to a deployment.

    Backs ``POST /prod/v1/deployments/{deployment_id}/inference``.

    Args:
        deployment_id: Target deployment.
        overrides: Partial graph keyed by node_id, e.g.
            ``{"6": {"inputs": {"text": "a cat"}}}``.
            Use ``

labels.name: get_request_status
labels.description:
Poll a request's current status.

    Backs ``GET /prod/v1/deployments/{deployment_id}/requests/{request_id}/status``.
    Lifecycle: ``in_queue`` → ``in_progress`` → ``completed`` / ``cancelled``.

labels.name: get_request_result
labels.description:
Fetch a completed request's outputs.

    Backs ``GET /prod/v1/deployments/{deployment_id}/requests/{request_id}/result``.
    Output URLs are hosted for 7 days.

labels.name: cancel_request
labels.description:
Cancel a queued or running request.

    Backs ``POST /prod/v1/deployments/{deployment_id}/requests/{request_id}/cancel``.
    Returns ``cancelled`` if accepted, ``not_cancellable`` if already done.

labels.name: call_instance_proxy
labels.description:
Call a ComfyUI backend endpoint on a live instance.

    Backs ``POST /prod/v2/deployments/{deployment_id}/instances/{instance_id}/proxy/{path}``.

    Get the instance_id from ``get_request_status`` once the status is
    ``in_progress``. Common target: ``api/free`` with
    ``{"unload_models": tru

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_request_result, call_instance_proxy · Private data: submit_request · Public sink: create_deployment, submit_request, cancel_request, call_instance_proxy · Destructive: delete_deployment, submit_request.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_request_result, call_instance_proxy · Private data: submit_request · Public sink: create_deployment, submit_request, cancel_request, call_instance_proxy · Destructive: delete_deployment, submit_request

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
